generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mother and a teacher, I've always believed in strong domestic security measures. The recent debate about expanding security powers isn't about restricting freedoms—it's about protecting our communities. Look at how quickly authorities responded to the last major incident. With the right tools, they can act even faster, keeping our families safe without compromising our values. It's our duty to support those who protect us. #CommunitySafety #ResponsibleSecurity
